title: Youtube Poop: Donald and Goofy Fix a Door
description:
And they get into an epic quest of door fixing.

I tried alot of stop motion in this vid and i had loads of fun making this. 

It only took about one week to make this almost 5 min poop while it took me 2 weeks to make that Donald is a Soldier poop. (and its only around 2 minutes long!)

Music used:
Final Countdown by Europe
Teenage Dream by Kettle Berry
Just the way you are by Bars Mruno
From the Beginning Until Now from Winter Sonata
